Selected Work 21 projects

Work that
earns its place.

Web design, brand identity, editorial systems, and digital experiences. Each project built to solve a specific problem — no decoration for its own sake.

Featured
View site ↗
Editorial Experimental HTML/CSS Motion Design
2025

Ministry of Final Things

Luxury apocalypse catalogue documenting the aesthetic collapse of civilization. A single-page editorial artifact combining post-Soviet brutalism, Bauhaus decay, and institutional surrealism — built in pure HTML/CSS with cinematic scroll choreography.
View site ↗
Digital Manifesto Existentialism Consciousness
2026

WHO ARE

An existential digital manifesto exploring identity, empire, consciousness, and the illusion of progress.
View site ↗
Spiritual Process Consciousness
2025

Divine Architecture

A visual exploration of the architecture of consciousness and the divine. A digital liturgy for the age of information, where the Logos is the operating system of reality and the Word is the code that runs the universe.

Sheva Berachos

We Are Not Separate

An immersive philosophical editorial exploring the dissolution of the isolated self into collective consciousness and divine unity.

Editorial Jekyll GitHub Pages
2024

Follow or Bounce

Publication platform at the intersection of technology, literature, and digital law. Built on a custom Jekyll stack deployed to GitHub Pages.

Brand Book Typography Colour
2024

Brand Identity System

Full visual identity for Follow or Bounce — logotype, colour system, type scale, editorial voice guidelines, and grid principles.
View site ↗
html Layout Static Site
2026

Marine Wood Craft

Custom marine services website for a Honolulu-based woodworking and boat restoration company. Clean single-page layout showcasing services, process, and contact for Pacific vessel work.
View site ↗
Logo Identity Guidelines
2026

Brand Identity System

Comprehensive brand identity passport for Marine Wood Craft — a reverse-engineered visual style guide covering color tokens, typography, motion language, component system, and cross-media application guidelines.
View site ↗
Static Site GitHub Pages Naming
2026

Bay Current Diving

Single-page service site for a solo commercial hull diver operating out of Fisherman's Wharf, San Francisco Bay. Covers underwater hull cleaning, barnacle removal, prop inspection, and zinc replacement for fishing and private vessels.
View site ↗
Brand Book Typography Colour
2026

Brand Identity System

Complete brand identity system for Bay Current Diving — covering color palette, typography, logo anatomy, icon system, photography direction, copy tone, workwear, and digital/SEO guidelines for a solo SF Bay commercial diving operation
View site ↗
Design System Style Guide Healthcare
2026

Meridian Mind Identity

Full brand identity guide for Meridian Mind, a psychiatric practice — covering logo system, therapeutic green color palette, Cormorant Garamond and DM Sans typography, UI components, motion principles, and voice guidelines for a calm, clinical digital presence.
View site ↗
Design System Editorial Presentation
2026

Brand Identity System - FoB_v2

Identity system presentation for Follow or Bounce v2 — a publication at the intersection of technology, literature, and law. Covers typographic scale, ink-on-paper color logic, grid principles, UI components, and the editorial philosophy behind the brand

Editorial Experimental Interactive Mythology
2025

The Hero's Journey

A ritualistic, mythopoetic exploration of the Hero's Journey across cultures — from Gilgamesh to the Bhagavad Gita. Luxury apocalypse aesthetics: acid greens, burnt oranges, fire particle systems, branching moral choices, and a philosophical inquiry into the Logos as the operating system of existence.
View site ↗
Editorial Experimental Interactive Mythology
2024

PROPHETIC OS

In order to understand where we are, we must first look at the surface of the earth. Everything matters. Sometimes we just don't see it. INVISIBLE ≠ EMPTY

Editorial Experimental Interactive
2026

The Illuminators

A cinematic meditation on self-deification, closed systems, and the ethics of light. Where projection becomes control.

The Architecture of Untruth

A philosophical editorial monument exploring lies, omission, and the collapse of sincerity in modern civilization. Avant-garde brutalist design inspired by Giacometti.

The Closed Door

A dark philosophical essay exploring DMT, consciousness, and the danger of forced transcendence through cyberpunk-minimalist design.
